question: Is the background environment (indoor gym) rendered in a modern photorealistic style?
Is Michelangelo's David statue rendered in a marble sculpture style with visible stone texture?
Is the magical girl rendered in a 90s retro cel-shaded anime style (flat colors, hard shadows, clean linework)?
Is the dog rendered in a voxel/Minecraft style with clearly blocky, cubic geometry?
Is the fitness trainer rendered in a photorealistic style (natural skin shading, realistic texture) consistent with the gym environment?
Does the bodybuilder exhibit Roy Lichtenstein Pop Art features (e.g., thick black outlines, Ben-Day dots, or comic shading)?
Are all five distinct styles (marble, cel-shaded anime, voxel, photorealistic, Pop Art) simultaneously present and distinguishable in the image?
Is there a clear stylistic contrast between the marble texture of David and the realistic skin texture of the trainer spotting him?
Is the voxel style of the dog clearly distinguishable from the anime style of the magical girl it is interacting with?
Does the barbell appear to be a realistic object (metal/rubber) distinct from the marble material of David's hands?
Does the Pop Art bodybuilder's body visually occlude the right half of David's body as described?
